title: Employee Daily Late/on-Time Data
excerpt:
Good morning,  I new to using Monday.com 
I am trying to set up a Workspace where I can gather daily data (manually entered) on how our employees show up at work. There would be 3 options I can select, once per day: Late…

posts.author: jeph45 (Jeff)
posts.cookedHtml:
Good morning, I new to using Monday.com
I am trying to set up a Workspace where I can gather daily data (manually entered) on how our employees show up at work. There would be 3 options I can select, once per day: Late, On Time, and N/A.
I then want to see this data displayed in a chart for visual presentation. What is the best way to do this?

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
One board is your input board, which creates an item on another board when a state is selected. That other board acts as the history you can build the dashboard from.

You could also use a form on a single board, and use a connect boards column to select the employee, and input the on-time/late data as it happens.

posts.author: jeph45 (Jeff)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks for the reply. You make it sound easy but TBH I have no clue how to set this up

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @jeph45 ,

To access the chart view in Monday.com, simply click on the “Views” button near the top-right corner of your board and select “Chart” from the dropdown menu.
